title: My Father Is a Cleaning Lady
original_title: Mon père est femme de ménage
overview: Polo is 16 and has all the worries of a teenager his age. Between a bedridden mother and a sister who dreams of being a Miss, the only one he can look up to is his father. Unfortunately, he works as a maid ...
